name: actionable-toast
title: Actionable Toast
description: An actionable toast confirms a recent low-risk operation and may offer one short recovery action such as Undo or Retry. It does not request a decision, carry long instructions, or hide a persistent error that belongs next to the affected content.
docs: Recipe contract (intent/anatomy/tokens/checks/anti-patterns): https://ui.askewly.com/llms/recipes/feedback/actionable-toast.md — after transplant, remap look to the project's own tokens per https://ui.askewly.com/llms/docs/design-system/component-restyle.md
